sections.description: Basic Tumblr publishing tools for WordPress posts, queue processing, OAuth connection, and post logging. Visit https://ravenhawktech.com for RavenHawkTech.
sections.installation: Upload the plugin ZIP in WordPress and activate it. Open RavenHawkTech → Tumblr Publisher to configure Tumblr OAuth and publishing settings.
sections.changelog:
2.0.0

  • Renamed and repackaged the plugin as RavenHawk Tumblr Publisher.
  • Moved plugin admin navigation under the RavenHawkTech parent menu.
  • Added RavenHawkTech admin menu and heading icons.
  • Updated standalone GitHub update manifest URL.
  • Preserved existing Tumblr OAuth, queue, logging, publishing, retry, and rate-limit behavior.
